name: Sinbad
bio: Sinbad, born David Adkins, is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for clean, observational, story-driven sets delivered without profanity, drawing on family, growing up, and everyday life. He broke through in the late 1980s and 1990s with HBO specials and television roles, including Coach Walter Oakes on A Different World and his own series The Sinbad Show.

timeline.ev: Begins role as Coach Walter Oakes on A Different World
First HBO special, Sinbad: Brain Damaged
HBO special Sinbad: Afros and Bellbottoms

accolades: Won a 1995 NAACP Image Award for Afros and Bellbottoms
Headlined the long-running Sinbads Soul Music Festival HBO concerts

bits.yt_title: Sinbad's Hilarious Stand-Up on Gotham Comedy Live
